_publications._publicationTitle: Discovery of a small molecule targeting IRA2 deletion in budding yeast and neurofibromin loss in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: UC1 decreased the number of viable T265 cells by MTS assay with an AC50 of 3.35 μM (95% CI 2.41 to 4.29 μM)
details: UC1 decreased viable T265 cells by MTS assay with an AC50 of 3.35 μM (95% CI 2.41 to 4.29 μM)
